intent: Pixel-match the BRD mockups in Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui + Motion. All 7 pages, sidebar nav, metric cards, status badges, booking form, filter+search, prescriptions, sign out. All 10 BRD test cases pass. Hospital-client-ready demo.
scope_preserved: Data model: consultation with all fields

Visual fidelity: pixel-matched to BRD mockups using design tokens extracted from mockup analysis
Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA vs basic BRD accessibility requirements
Tests: Playwright browser tests (same happy-path coverage as BRD ui_test.py spec)
